mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, cabin_type, price_adult, price_child, price_infant, sort_order, created_at FROM cruise_prices WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cruise_prices (product_id, cabin_type, price_adult, price_child, price_infant, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{cabinType}, #{priceAdult}, #{priceChild}, #{priceInfant}, #{sortOrder}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE cruise_prices SET cabin_type = #{cabinType}, price_adult = #{priceAdult}, price_child = #{priceChild}, price_infant = #{priceInfant}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
